title: Baseline Portfolio V0
outcome: 33 holdings loaded (19 longs, 14 shorts); gross long 1.15048, gross short 0.85098, net 0.29950; short-cap breaches identified (13 of 14).

title: Baseline Risk V0
outcome: VaR 2.044% (1D,99%), ES 2.342%, vol 13.95% ann.; Max DD -14.49%; stress worst: Credit Crunch -16.28%; key risk drivers: ELF, CELH, FRPT; correlation clusters in beverages/household/distributors; many shorts >4% cap.

title: Market Research V0
outcome: Sticky inflation with cautious Fed cuts; USD strength; persistent trade-down; mixed commodity inputs (cocoa/sugar high); beauty volatility/tariffs/China; distributor margins normalizing. Implications logged for rebalancing: resize high-vol shorts, trim beauty cluster risk and IPAR, manage beverage/household cluster, keep value grocers and defensives.

title: Iteration 1 Results
outcome: Material risk reduction with caps on shorts, trims in clustered longs; VaR 1.715%, ES 1.965%, vol 11.70% ann.; Max DD -10.81%; credit stress -11.55%; constraints clean (shorts <=4%, longs 18, shorts 14, net ~30%).

title: Iteration 2 Results
outcome: Further de-risked: VaR 1.644%, ES 1.884%, vol 11.22% ann.; Max DD -10.34%; severe stress improved (Credit Crunch -10.41%); distributor cluster reduced; dropped IPAR. Constraints clean, net ~30%, shorts ≤4%.

title: Final Portfolio Vfinal
outcome: Selected V2 as final: 17 longs / 14 shorts; net ~0.300; VaR 1.644% (1D,99%), ES 1.884%, vol 11.22% ann.; Max DD -10.34%; improved severe stress outcomes; all shorts <= 4%.
